---
layout: cv
title: Jackson Ham's CV
---
# Jackson Ham
Finance Student

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="jacksonjham@gmail.com">jacksonjham@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="www.linkedin.com/in/jackson-ham">My Linkedin page</a>
</div>


## Currently

Studying at BYU-I

### Specialized in

Finance, Data Science, Business Fundamentals

## Education

`2021-2026`
Brigham Young University - Idaho

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: July 2026 -->
